import.meta.env = {"BASE_URL": "/", "DEV": true, "MODE": "development", "PROD": false, "SSR": false, "VITE_GEMINI_API_KEY": "AIzaSyDMRWb8o6ZZ85LDcGnP6Bq8ozqc_32C5qU", "VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY": "AIzaSyAsSrZzlNSaNNm2h2yUDP41p56qYQSAQ3g", "VITE_SMARTSHEET_SHEET_ID": "1833739362822020", "VITE_SMARTSHEET_TOKEN": "2RrwMyQPbc3MzzBE0jl05SFUgTndzBvctSsfO"};const TOKEN = import.meta.env.VITE_SMARTSHEET_TOKEN;
const SHEET_ID = import.meta.env.VITE_SMARTSHEET_SHEET_ID;
export const fetchConstructionJobs = async () => {
	if (!TOKEN || !SHEET_ID) {
		console.warn("Smartsheet configuration missing");
		return [];
	}
	try {
		const response = await fetch(`/api/smartsheet/2.0/sheets/${SHEET_ID}`, { headers: {
			"Authorization": `Bearer ${TOKEN}`,
			"Content-Type": "application/json"
		} });
		if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch from Smartsheet");
		const data = await response.json();
		const columns = data.columns;
		// Map column titles to IDs for easier access
		const colMap = {};
		columns.forEach((col) => {
			colMap[col.title] = col.id;
		});
		return data.rows.map((row) => {
			const getVal = (title) => {
				const id = colMap[title];
				const cell = row.cells.find((c) => c.columnId === id);
				return cell?.displayValue || cell?.value?.toString() || "";
			};
			return {
				id: row.id,
				jobNumber: getVal("Primary"),
				status: getVal("Secondary Status"),
				address: getVal("Address"),
				city: getVal("City"),
				notes: getVal("NSC Project Notes"),
				crew: getVal("Construction Crew/Foreman"),
				scheduleDate: getVal("Schedule Date"),
				cpaSro: getVal("CPA/SRO"),
				supervisor: getVal("Construction Supervisor")
			};
		}).filter((job) => job.supervisor === "Billy Keesee");
	} catch (error) {
		console.error("Lumina Data Sync Error:", error);
		return [];
	}
};

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
